description: SmartSafe CNC 605 PRO PLUS is a cleaning and testing equipment suitable for piezoelectric (140V), GDI (65V/12V) and conventional fuel injectors. It uses ultrasonic cleaning technology combined with microprocessor oil pressure control technology to simulate various engine working conditions and clean and test automobile fuel injectors.

features.description: Can select EFI (12V), GDI (65V) or PIEZO (140V) operating mode based on the injector type
features.title: Multi-Mode Operation

features.description: Capable of simultaneously ultrasonic cleaning multiple injectors, effectively removing carbon buildup
features.title: Ultrasonic Cleaning

features.description: Includes low resistance testing, uniformity/spray testing, sealing test, and fuel injection quantity detection
features.title: Comprehensive Testing

name: CNC 605 PRO PLUS
specs: Working mode selection: Can select EFI (12V), GDI (65V) or PIEZO (140V) operating mode based on the injector type
Ultrasonic Cleaning: Capable of simultaneously ultrasonic cleaning multiple injectors, effectively removing carbon buildup
Low resistance testing: Supports low-resistance injector testing, capable of detecting short circuits and open circuits in fuel injectors

Uniformity/Spray Testing Function: Detects the uniformity of fuel injection quantity for each injector and the spray atomization of the injector can be comprehensively and carefully observed using the background light
Sealing Test Function: Tests the sealing and leakage of injectors under system pressure
Fuel Injection Quantity Detection Function: Measures the fuel injection quantity of injectors under a constant 15-second injection condition
Automatic Cleaning and Testing Function: Under specific working parameters, realistically simulates injector testing under various conditions

Reverse Flush Function: For the uniformity/spray testing item, performs a reverse flush using a reverse flush adapter to remove internal injector contaminants and residues attached to the filter screen
Non-Dismantle Cleaning Function: Equipped with various non-dismantle cleaning adapters, allowing non-dismantle cleaning and maintenance for multiple vehicle models
summary: CNC605+ is a cleaning and testing equipment suitable for piezoelectric (140V), GDI (65V/12V) and conventional fuel injectors.

description: The VSP-828 videoscope is designed for accessing narrow, curved spaces like evaporation boxes, combustion chambers, and three-way catalytic sensors. It captures vivid, clear and multi-angle videos and images, transferring them to a computer or smartphone display via a data cable for versatile inspections. Three versions with varying lens tubes are available for your choice.

features.description: Three lens versions available: 6.2mm Rotating Lens, 5.5mm Dual-lens, and 5.5mm Standard Version
features.title: Multiple Lens Options

features.description: 4GB built-in storage with support for external TF cards up to 32GB, picture taking and audio/video recording
features.title: Storage & Recording

features.description: Flashlight assist, 3x magnification, 4-gear LED light adjustment, image rotation and color switching
features.title: Advanced Features

name: VSP-828
specs: Three lens versions for choice: 6.2mm Rotating Lens Version (RECOMMENDED), 5.5mm Dual-lens Version (Switch between front and side), 5.5mm Standard Version (Single direction)
Support for external TF cards up to 32GB
Switch the image between black-and-white and color
summary: The VSP-828 videoscope is designed for accessing narrow, curved spaces like evaporation boxes, combustion chambers, and three-way catalytic sensors.

description: Composed of two magnetic measurement units and four wheel clamp targets, connected via a wireless network, the X-613 is another wireless, ready-to-use four-wheel aligner for repair shops. Unlike traditional 3D wheel aligners, the X-613 eliminates the need for beams and cabinets, pairing with the LAUNCH diagnostic tool(X-431 PAD9/7/5 LINK) to perform precise four-wheel alignment detection. The X-613 supports both standard measurement and quick measurement, including key parameters such as toe, camber, caster, kingpin inclination, and thrust angle, as well as additional measurements including track width, wheelbase, wheel offset, axle offset, diagonal offset, and center offset.

features.description: No wiring required, ready to use by simply screwing targets onto wheel clamps
features.title: Wireless Ready-to-Use

features.description: No beams or cabinets for preinstallation, ideal for repair shops with limited space
features.title: Space Saving

features.description: Supports alignment data for 50,000+ vehicle models worldwide
features.title: Extensive Database

name: X-613 Portable 3D Wheel Aligner
specs: 2 magnetic measurement units + 4 wheel clamp targets
No wiring required, ready to use
Supports both standard and quick measurement
Measures toe, camber, caster, kingpin inclination, thrust angle
Additional measurements: track width, wheelbase, wheel offset, axle offset, diagonal offset, center offset
summary: Composed of two magnetic measurement units and four wheel clamp targets, the X-613 is a wireless, ready-to-use four-wheel aligner for repair shops.
